name: cloud-risk-triage-agent-api
description: Autonomous cloud security posture sweep for Tenable Cloud Security via the public GraphQL API with a Bearer API token (no MCP connection). Runs four triage checks — AWS root users without MFA, third-party identities with sensitive-data access, publicly exposed resources, and exposed secrets — mapped to Findings, and writes a SOC-ready report. Always lists every check, marking empty results.
